name: Lemon Way European Payment Institution API
what_it_does: Lemon Way European payment institution REST API for crowdfunding platforms, marketplaces, and regulated financial ecosystems to manage e-wallets, escrow payments, multi-party payment splitting, KYC verification, and SEPA transfers under Lemon Way's French ACPR payment institution license — specialized for platforms requiring regulated payment account management for multiple parties (investors, borrowers, buyers, sellers). Enables AI agents to manage e-wallet creation for platform participant account automation, handle payment collection for crowdfunding contribution automation, access escrow management for fund holding automation, retrieve multi-party split for marketplace payment distribution automation, manage KYC verification for participant identity automation, handle SEPA credit transfer for bank payout automation, access card payment collection for investor funding automation, retrieve compliance monitoring for AML/KYC reporting automation, manage IBANs for virtual account assignment automation, and integrate Lemon Way with crowdfunding, P2P lending, and regulated marketplace platforms for end-to-end payment infrastructure automation.
use_cases: Managing crowdfunding contribution escrow and release for real estate and startup funding platform agents
Creating and managing e-wallets for marketplace buyer and seller accounts in regulated payment platform agents
Processing multi-party payment splits for marketplace disbursement and commission collection automation agents
Executing KYC verification and AML compliance for platform participant onboarding automation agents
not_for: Simple e-commerce checkout (Lemon Way is for multi-party marketplace and crowdfunding payment infrastructure)
Consumer-facing payment apps without platform intermediary role (Lemon Way is platform-to-platform)
Unregulated payment flows without KYC requirements (Lemon Way requires ACPR-compliant KYC)
best_when: A crowdfunding platform, P2P lending marketplace, or regulated multi-party payment ecosystem in Europe wanting AI agents to manage e-wallets, escrow, and SEPA payments under Lemon Way's ACPR payment institution license.
avoid_when: ACPR REGULATED — COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: Lemon Way is an ACPR-licensed payment institution; automated platform use without own compliance program creates regulatory exposure; automated must implement Lemon Way's KYC/AML requirements for all platform participants. WALLET-BASED PAYMENT MODEL: Lemon Way uses e-wallet as the central payment unit; automated direct account-to-account transfer assumption creates wrong architecture; automated must create wallet for each participant and route payments through wallets. KYC IS BLOCKING FOR HIGH-VALUE OPERATIONS: Lemon Way KYC limits apply per tier; automated high-value payment without completed KYC creates blocked_wallet status; automated must complete KYC verification before allowing above-threshold transactions. SOAP AND REST BOTH AVAILABLE: Lemon Way offers both SOAP and REST APIs; automated REST-only assumption misses legacy SOAP endpoints still in use by some features; automated greenfield integrations should use REST but must be aware of SOAP heritage.

auth.notes: Lemon Way uses login + password for API authentication (basic auth style). REST and legacy SOAP APIs. Paris, France HQ. Founded 2007 by Sébastien Burlet. Products: E-wallet, escrow, multi-party split, SEPA transfer, card payment, KYC/AML, virtual IBAN. SDKs: PHP, Node.js, Python, .NET. ACPR-licensed (French banking regulator), PSD2 compliant. 300+ platform clients including real estate crowdfunding, P2P lending, and marketplace platforms. Competes with Mangopay and Treezor for European marketplace payment infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered partners; production requires Lemon Way commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fee + monthly platform fee; wallet management fees; KYC verification fees
pricing.notes: Paris FR. ACPR licensed. Per-transaction + platform fees. Partnership required. Crowdfunding/marketplace specialist.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API credentials; payment and wallet APIs throttled; webhooks for transaction events

known_agent_gotchas: WALLET MUST EXIST BEFORE PAYMENT: Lemon Way requires e-wallet creation for each participant before payment routing; automated direct transfer assumption creates unknown_wallet error; automated must create wallet per participant (buyer, seller, borrower, investor) before transaction

KYC TIER LIMITS BLOCK TRANSACTIONS: Lemon Way wallets have transaction limits per KYC tier (0, 1, 2, 3); automated high-value payment without completed KYC creates transaction_blocked; automated must verify KYC tier before initiating above-threshold transaction

LEGACY SOAP + MODERN REST: Lemon Way has both SOAP and REST APIs; automated REST-only assumption may miss some legacy features; automated new integrations should use REST but may encounter SOAP-based documentation in older resources

LOGIN/PASSWORD AUTH IS NOT API KEY: Lemon Way authentication uses login+password credentials (not bearer token); automated standard API key header assumption creates authentication failure; automated must use HTTP Basic auth format with login/password credentials

WEBHOOK NOTIFICATION FOR ASYNC PAYMENTS: Lemon Way card and bank transfers are asynchronous; automated synchronous payment confirmation creates premature order fulfillment; automated must implement webhook endpoint to receive payment status notifications
agent_readiness.security_notes: French ACPR payment institution. ACPR, PSD2, GDPR, 5AMLD. Login/password basic auth. EU/FR. Wallet, escrow, and participant financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: ACPR payment institution. PSD2, GDPR, AML. Basic auth. EU/FR. Wallet and platform financial data.
